item.title: This is one of the more racist and disgusting erasures of radical black organizaing I have seen but this undertone of lying abou...
item.description:
This is one of the more racist and disgusting erasures of radical black organizaing I have seen but this undertone of lying about how and why change happens is genuinely despicable and common and actually the function of liberalism#greenscreenvideo

item.title: Freedom is when you’re not under the tyranny of an empire that wants to destroy any Democratic aims you have

item.title: Hiding their disagreement is the first step to preventing us from critiquing it because if we can’t be honest about why and how ...
item.description:
Hiding their disagreement is the first step to preventing us from critiquing it because if we can’t be honest about why and how we believe something then we can’t even get to engage with why they are wrong for believing it#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: do you not cringe even a little bit when saying shit like this?
item.description:
do you not cringe even a little bit when saying shit like this? Like does it not cross your mind that you look silly?
